'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=c5eBSc5IprFws4DY9jS3U80WrXzhW1szw5u2LX5Sap4-1774084478-1.0.1.1-moNuORTcyO26JfR1KnoZTp_xiLZY3p.iL3pjIrfLvw4"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
